LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JORDAN MEDINA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558099 WITH CASE CGC-17-561011 IS GRANTED. THE TWO CASES ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CASE 558099 IS THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FURTHER FILINGS MUST BE IN THE LEAD CASE ONLY. THE TRIAL DATE OF APRIL 2, 2018 PREVIOUSLY SET IN CASE 558099 IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 17, 2018 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30AM AND THAT TRIAL DATE APPLIES TO BOTH CONSOLIDATED CASES. ALL DISCOVERY DEADLINES WILL BE TRIGGERED OFF THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MARCH 14, 2018 PREVIOUSLY SET IN CASE 561011 IS NOW VACATED. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DEADLINE AS TO THE ROBINSON PLAINTIFFS CAN BE REVIVED BY EX PARTE. ALL PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE WITH REGARDS TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL FOR MR. MEDINA IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM; MTORREANO@SFTC.ORG. [302]

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-17-558099 WITH CASE CGC-17-561011
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAHER TAMIM's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS (CGC-17-558099 WITH CASE CGC-17-561011)is Off calendar. The two cases were consolidated by oral order on January 30, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2018 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jacob Gould, Esq. of Barrington Legal, T:310.231.8755, for plaintiff, by Court Call;
Leila Mohseni, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP, T:415.362.6000, for defendant;
Bryan Vereschagin, Esq. of Vereschagin Law Firm PC, T:415.834.5434, for Robinson plaintiffs.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JORDAN MEDINA'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Mr. Medina has leave to file his proposed first amended complaint no later than February 6, 2018. It will not be deemed filed.

Counsel for Mr. Jordan is to prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558099 WITH CASE CGC-17-561011
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jacob Gould, Esq. of Barrington Legal, T:310.231.8755, for plaintiff, by Court Call;
Leila Mohseni, Esq. of Hinshaw & Culbertson LLP, T:415.362.6000, for defendant;
Bryan Vereschagin, Esq. of Vereschagin Law Firm PC, T:415.834.5434, for Robinson plaintiffs.

RULING: The new trial date and discovery deadlines were discussed. After hearing, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF JORDAN MEDINA'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-558099 WITH CASE CGC-17-561011, modified as follows:

Plaintiff Jordan Medina's motion to consolidate case 558099 with case 561011 is granted. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case 558099 is the lead case and all further filings must be in the lead case only. The trial date of April 2, 2018 previously set in case 558099 is continued to September 17, 2018 in Department 206 at 9:30am and that trial date applies to both consolidated cases. All discovery deadlines will be triggered off the new trial date. The case management conference of March 14, 2018 previously set in case 561011 is now vacated. The Motion For Summary Judgment deadline as to the Robinson plaintiffs can be revived by ex parte. All parties waive notice with regards to the new trial date.

Counsel for Mr. Medina is to prepare and submit a proposed order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
